evals.prompt: What's the latest stable version of Node.js? I need to know before I update my project.
evals.expected_output: Reports the current Node.js LTS version with a source URL from the search results

evals.prompt: I'm getting this error when I run my Django app: `django.db.utils.OperationalError: no such table: auth_user`. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Searches for the error, finds relevant Stack Overflow or documentation results, and provides a fix (run migrations)

evals.prompt: Help me set up a new SvelteKit project with the latest recommended configuration and deployment on Vercel.
evals.expected_output: Proactively searches for current SvelteKit setup guides and Vercel deployment docs, provides up-to-date instructions
